description_long: This object is a classic-style microphone mounted on a tall, round-based stand, commonly seen in broadcasting studios or public speaking venues. The microphone features a metallic grille with horizontal slats and a cylindrical body, attached to a U-shaped bracket for angling adjustment. A visible cable extends from the microphone, looping around the stand and ending in a standard audio jack plug, indicating it is a wired device. The stand is constructed from metal tubing with adjustable height mechanisms and a wide, heavy base for stability. The overall color scheme is a combination of metallic silver and matte black, giving it a professional and robust appearance. The design suggests it is intended for stationary use in environments where high-quality audio capture is required.
description: A vintage-style wired microphone on a tall, adjustable metal stand with a round base and visible audio cable. The object is primarily metallic silver and black, designed for professional audio capture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the microphone grille, U-bracket, and cable hanging down the stand.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the cylindrical microphone body and the cable looping around the stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the microphone, cable attachment, and the full length of the stand.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the microphone's profile and the cable extending outward.
